summary: Tested major overhaul features: Hero buttons, ComparisonSection removal, Razorpay payment integration, and Contact form. All backend APIs working correctly (13/13 tests passed). Frontend mostly working - hero buttons correct, ComparisonSection removed, Razorpay checkout flow working. One issue: Footer still has 'Order via WhatsApp' link that should be removed per requirements.

ui_bugs.issue: 'Order via WhatsApp' link still present in footer (lines 171-179) - should be removed per requirements
WhatsApp icon link (wa.me) still present in footer social icons (lines 86-94)

passed_tests: Homepage hero: 'Shop Now' button visible and links to /mango-harvest
Homepage hero: 'Unlock Secret Garden Box' button visible and links to /farm-basket-subscription
Homepage: No 'Why Choose Us' or 'What Sets Mitti Basket Apart' section present
Contact page: form has Name, Email, Phone, Message fields and Submit button
Contact page: POST /api/contact endpoint works (saves to DB, returns success)
Backend: GET /api/razorpay-key returns test key ID (rzp_test_*)
Backend: POST /api/orders creates order with razorpay_order_id
Backend: POST /api/payment/verify endpoint exists and validates signature
Cart checkout: 'Proceed to Checkout' button shown (not WhatsApp)
Cart checkout: 'Proceed to Payment' button in checkout view
Cart checkout: 'Secure payment via Razorpay (UPI, Cards, Netbanking)' text shown
Navigation: Shop Now button navigates to /mango-harvest correctly
Navigation: Unlock Secret Garden Box navigates to /farm-basket-subscription correctly
failed_tests: Footer still has 'Order via WhatsApp' link (wa.me reference)
Footer still has WhatsApp icon in social links
action_items: Remove 'Order via WhatsApp' link from Footer.js (lines 171-179)
Consider removing WhatsApp icon from footer social links (lines 86-94) or change to phone link
Optional: Update TermsPage.js and PrivacyPolicyPage.js to remove WhatsApp mentions in policy text
critical_code_review_comments: Footer.js lines 171-179: 'Order via WhatsApp' link should be removed per requirements to remove all WhatsApp ordering references
Footer.js lines 86-94: WhatsApp icon link (wa.me) in social icons - consider changing to regular phone link or removing
test_credentials: No auth credentials needed - public marketing website
seed_data_creation: None - used test data in API tests with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major overhaul complete: Hero buttons updated (Shop Now → /mango-harvest, Unlock Secret Garden Box → /farm-basket-subscription), ComparisonSection removed from homepage, Razorpay payment integration working (GET /api/razorpay-key, POST /api/orders with razorpay_order_id, POST /api/payment/verify), Contact form working (POST /api/contact). Only remaining issue: Footer.js still has 'Order via WhatsApp' link and WhatsApp icon that should be removed. Cart/checkout flow shows 'Proceed to Payment' and 'Secure payment via Razorpay' text correctly.
